channel.title: Backup on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Backup on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] General Availability: Backup your ledger files for audit with Azure confidential ledger’s new tool
item.description:
Azure Confidential Ledger introduced a new localized web tool for backing up ledger files so auditors can inspect them and verify cryptographic proofs. The update is in general availability.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Backup for Cosmos DB
item.description:
Azure Backup for Cosmos DB is now in public preview. It adds vaulted backups for Cosmos DB accounts to support cyber-resiliency, compliance, and isolated backup storage.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Snapshot backup for SQL Server in Azure VMs
item.description:
Azure Backup now supports snapshot-based backup for SQL Server on Azure Virtual Machines in public preview. It uses Azure disk snapshots with native SQL transaction log backups to provide near-instant, low-impact full backups for large SQL databases.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure NetApp Files enable backup by default
item.description:
Azure NetApp Files now enables backup by default for newly created volumes in public preview. Backups are provisioned automatically at volume creation to simplify setup and improve data protection.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Single Volume Snapshots on Azure Elastic SAN
item.description:
Azure Elastic SAN now supports single volume snapshots in general availability. The feature provides incremental, point-in-time backups for individual SAN volumes, storing snapshots within the SAN.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Backup for Elastic SAN
item.description:
Azure Backup now supports Elastic SAN in public preview. It can back up and restore Elastic SAN volumes to help protect against accidental deletion, ransomware, and application-related changes.

  • Source: Azure Updates
